subject: A blue bucket with a black handle, filled with water, surrounded by splashing water droplets and bubbles against a light blue background
description: A rounded blue bucket dominates the frame, its dark handle arcing above the rim. The bucket appears filled with water and is caught mid-splash, with water droplets and small bubbles radiating outward from around it. The surface of the water inside the bucket glints with light. The background is a soft, pale blue suggestive of an open watery or sky setting. The illustration has a clean, simple graphic quality — light-rendered, object-focused, with no figures present. The overall feel is fresh and functional.
foreground: blue bucket with dark handle, water spilling and splashing
emotion: neutral — object card, no figure present
